source.name: Material Design 3
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; site may require JavaScript for full content.

layout_rules: Use dialogs for short blocking decisions, not for long workflows.
Make the title and action labels specific to the decision.
Keep content brief and avoid nesting complex navigation inside a dialog.
accessibility_notes: Trap focus while open and return focus to the trigger on close.
Use semantic labels and clear keyboard dismissal behavior.
implementation_hints: Use for confirmations and small decisions in mobile/web apps.
Do not use a modal when inline editing or a dedicated page would be clearer.

quality.notes: Official Material page URL verified, but web text required JavaScript in this environment.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Material dialog patterns for short blocking decisions: focused surface, specific title/action labels, brief content, focus trapping, and clear confirm/cancel behavior.
